summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Aetheris Spatial quality, accessibility, and legal compliance layer (iteration 2). Most new features working correctly including security headers, input sanitization, GDPR/CCPA compliance endpoints, cookie consent, and WCAG 2.2 AA accessibility features. Rate limiting implementation has issues.

critical_bugs.issue: AI endpoint returns 429 immediately on first request, suggesting rate limiter is too aggressive or misconfigured
critical_bugs.impact: AI Co-Designer feature may be unusable

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: Rate limiting not triggered after 65 requests to /api/products (should limit at 60/min)
flaky_endpoints.workaround: Rate limiting may not be working for non-AI endpoints

passed_tests: Backend API - GET /api/health returns healthy status with version and timestamp
Backend API - GET /api/legal/privacy-summary returns GDPR/CCPA compliance info with rights array
Backend API - Security headers present: X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, X-XSS-Protection, HSTS, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy
Backend API - Input sanitization prevents script execution on search endpoint
Backend API - Product discovery still works: GET /api/products returns products
Backend API - Product detail still works: GET /api/products/prod_modular_desk_01
Frontend - Landing page loads with skip-to-main-content link (WCAG 2.4.1)
Frontend - Cookie consent banner appears on first visit (GDPR)
Frontend - Cookie consent Accept button works and hides banner on subsequent visits
Frontend - Privacy Policy page loads at /privacy with proper content sections (GDPR, CCPA, rights, cookies)
Frontend - Terms of Service page loads at /terms with proper content sections (acceptance, liability, termination)
Frontend - 404 page shows for non-existent routes like /nonexistent
Frontend - Footer has links to Privacy Policy and Terms of Service
Frontend - All interactive elements have visible focus indicators (focus-visible)
Frontend - Navigation has proper ARIA roles and labels
Frontend - Skip-to-content link becomes visible on focus
Frontend - Cookie consent banner stays hidden after acceptance

success_percentage.frontend: 100% - All accessibility and compliance features working

action_item_for_main_agent: Rate limiting implementation needs fixing: 1) AI endpoint rate limiter is too aggressive (returns 429 on first request), 2) General API rate limiting not working (no 429 after 65 requests when limit should be 60/min). All other quality/accessibility/legal features are working perfectly.
